stemHtml: During a go-around in IMC, the pilot flying does NOT pitch up to the nominal attitude for the go-around and the aircraft accelerates. In order to determine the flight path, the pilot flying must:

options.a: NOT rely on the his/her "seat-of-the-pants", unless he/she has completed a spatial disorientation training.
options.b: Ignore his/her "seat-of-the-pants" sense as it is completely unreliable.
options.c: Rely on the his/her "seat-of-the-pants" sense only during the initiation of the go-around manoeuvre.
options.d: Rely on the his/her "seat-of-the-pants" sense as visual contact is lost.
